sector_summary: The Energy sector (XLE) shows strong performance and medium confidence, making it a top pick. Technology (XLK) and Utilities (XLU) also have medium confidence but with varying performance. Healthcare (XLV) has a conflict between negative price momentum and positive news flow, which reduces its attractiveness. Avoid sectors like Financials (XLF) and Consumer Staples (XLP) due to low confidence.
